title: Highly Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support, Rich Media, and Typing Indicators

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Highly Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support, Rich Media, and Typing Indicators

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><g transform='translate(0, 0)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><g transform='translate(20, 20)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='220' y='0' width='140' height='260' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='0' y='30' width='200' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><rect x='220' y='30' width='140' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><text x='10' y='55' font-size='24' fill='#fff'>Channels</text><text x='230' y='55' font-size='24' fill='#fff'>Search</text><ellipse cx='150' cy='50' rx='10' ry='10' fill='#fff'/><g transform='translate(150, 60)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='180' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='100' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='110' y='0' width='100' height='100' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='10' y='25' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Channel 1</text><text x='120' y='25' font-size='18' font-style='italic' fill='#fff'>Video Call</text><text x='10' y='115' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Channel 2</text><text x='120' y='115' font-size='18' font-style='italic' fill='#fff'>Live Stream</text></g></g><g transform='translate(220, 110)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='140' height='160' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='10' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='40' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='70' y='10' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='10' y='40' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='10' y='70' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><rect x='10' y='100' width='20' height='20' fill='#fff'/><text x='70' y='50' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Media</text></g></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include typing indicators for each channel
Must include media gallery with video and live stream icons

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Highly Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support, Rich Media, and Typing Indicators

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, channel selection, typing indicators, and media gallery functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
